preferred_translation: dynamic balance tied to the household life
definition: MN 137's category of dynamic balance that remains bounded by the object and does not go beyond it.
notes: Use this record for the household-side dynamic-balance family in MN 137. Keep the household tie explicit and keep the point sharp: this is a calm-looking balance that still does not go beyond the object. Do not flatten it into neutral calm or generic equanimity.

example_phrases.translation: six dynamic balances tied to the household life
example_phrases.notes: Category label in the thirty-six positions section of MN 137.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the household-side dynamic-balance family in the six-fields analysis.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English label for the gehasita upekkhā category in MN 137 unless a recorded local reason requires minor grammatical adjustment.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the category into static calm or generic equanimity language that loses the household-side distinction.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the MN 137 category from drifting into generic calm language or dropping the household-side tie.
